goalbuddy_receipt_v1.rationale: The failure is harness-only. HTML returns an empty string for the present open attribute, and the helper's truthiness test toggles an already-open details element closed. Replace only the presence test with an explicit null comparison; preserve all product code, keyboard/focus behavior, assertions, and timeout.

worker_package.objective: Make the helper open the disclosure only when the open attribute is absent, then complete Pantry browser/accessibility/screenshots, disposable DB, port, and diff evidence.
verify: Two axe scans and five screenshots
stop_if: Isolation/ownership fails or live/shared state would be used.

evidence: Both attempts persisted the first batch and location and then failed only on the second hidden select.
Screenshots show the disclosure open; getAttribute(open) returns empty string, which the helper misclassifies.
The uncontrolled product details element is not closed by product code.

parallel_safety.rationale: One mirror, port, browser output, and disposable DB.

required_board_updates: Keep T999 queued until passing receipt.
